title: Support Services Department - Our Services
content:
Support Services Department - Our Services

Our services as Support Services Department;

By taking part in all activities of our university, it is to ensure that security, transportation, cleaning and counseling services are carried out without interruption. In addition, it is to ensure that all physical areas of our university provide clean, safe and hygienic services and the continuity of these services.

To provide joint service and contribution with our other units by providing transportation services in the provision of all promotional activities.

This content was updated on 17/09/2024.
